summary: Excellent matrix mix captures a superb performance with Donna’s soaring vocals on “Music Never Stopped”, the laid‑back “Looks Like Rain”, and the rare “Mission in the Rain”.
review: The recording is praised for its vivid matrix blend of soundboard clarity and crowd ambience, delivering a powerful presence despite occasional minor imperfections. Fans love the show’s progression from restrained first‑set work into soaring second‑set jams, highlighting Donna Jean’s vocal moments and several standout songs.

ai_rating.rationale: All seven reviews are five‑star and uniformly praise both the musical performance and the matrix recording quality, indicating an exceptional show with excellent technical presentation.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Matrix blend praised for depth and presence; crowd noise adds atmosphere. Reviewers note minor cleanliness issues but overall very clear and well‑balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as restrained while the band “shook their new stuff down,” leading to a rollicking, highly‑evolved second set with extended jams and heightened expression.
